title: Tool Call Record
description: A structured record of a tool invocation through the Runtime Permission Gateway. Each call is checked against the permission matrix, logged for audit, and optionally redacted for PII before execution.

arguments.description: Arguments passed to the tool. PII fields should already be redacted at this point if the gateway applied redaction.

caller_agent.description: Identifier of the agent that initiated the tool call

caller_skill.description: Identifier of the skill that initiated the tool call

case_id.description: Unique identifier for the support case associated with this tool call

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the permission check, timezone-aware (UTC)

status.description: Result of the permission check: allowed = tool may execute, denied = blocked by gateway, error = unexpected error during check

denial_reason.description: Human-readable reason for denial (present only when status is denied or error)
examples: send_email is always denied — no override allowed
P1 cases deny all write tools

result_summary.description: Optional summary of the tool execution result (for allowed calls that were actually executed)

latency_ms.description: Latency of the permission check in milliseconds

examples.denial_reason: send_email is always denied — no override allowed

examples.result_summary: Draft created and submitted for human review
